    92→

    97→
    98→    func attachGateway(_ gateway: GatewayNodeSession) {
    99→        self.gateway = gateway

   101→
   102→    func updateGatewayConnected(_ connected: Bool) {
   103→        self.gatewayConnected = connected
   104→        if connected {
   105→            // If talk mode is enabled before the gateway connects (common on cold start),
   106→            // kick recognition once we're online so the UI doesn’t stay “Offline”.
   107→            if self.isEnabled, !self.isListening, self.captureMode != .pushToTalk {
   108→                Task { await self.start() }
   109→            }
   110→        } else {
   111→            if self.isEnabled, !self.isSpeaking {
   112→                self.statusText = "Offline"
   113→            }
   114→        }
   115→    }
   116→
   117→    func updateMainSessionKey(_ sessionKey: String?) {
   118→        let trimmed = (sessionKey ?? "").trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
   119→        guard !trimmed.isEmpty else { return }
   120→        if trimmed == self.mainSessionKey { return }
   121→        self.mainSessionKey = trimmed
   122→        if self.gatewayConnected, self.isEnabled {
   123→            Task { await self.subscribeChatIfNeeded(sessionKey: trimmed) }
   124→        }
   125→    }
   126→
   127→    func setEnabled(_ enabled: Bool) {
   128→        self.isEnabled = enabled
   129→        if enabled {
   130→            self.logger.info("enabled")
   131→            Task { await self.start() }
   132→        } else {
   133→            self.logger.info("disabled")
   134→            self.stop()
   135→        }
   136→    }
   137→
   138→    func start() async {
   139→        guard self.isEnabled else { return }
   140→        guard self.captureMode != .pushToTalk else { return }
   141→        if self.isListening { return }
   142→        guard self.gatewayConnected else {
   143→            self.statusText = "Offline"
   144→            return
   145→        }
   146→
   147→        self.logger.info("start")
   148→        self.statusText = "Requesting permissions…"
   149→        let micOk = await Self.requestMicrophonePermission()
   150→        guard micOk else {
   151→            self.logger.warning("start blocked: microphone permission denied")
   152→            self.statusText = Self.permissionMessage(
   153→                kind: "Microphone",
   154→                status: AVAudioSession.sharedInstance().recordPermission)
   155→            return
   156→        }
   157→        let speechOk = await Self.requestSpeechPermission()
   158→        guard speechOk else {
   159→            self.logger.warning("start blocked: speech permission denied")
   160→            self.statusText = Self.permissionMessage(
   161→                kind: "Speech recognition",
   162→                status: SFSpeechRecognizer.authorizationStatus())
   163→            return
   164→        }
   165→
   166→        await self.reloadConfig()
   167→        do {
   168→            try Self.configureAudioSession()
   169→            // Set this before starting recognition so any early speech errors are classified correctly.
   170→            self.captureMode = .continuous
   171→            try self.startRecognition()
   172→            self.isListening = true
   173→            self.statusText = "Listening"
   174→            self.startSilenceMonitor()
   175→            await self.subscribeChatIfNeeded(sessionKey: self.mainSessionKey)
   176→            self.logger.info("listening")
   177→        } catch {
   178→            self.isListening = false
   179→            self.statusText = "Start failed: \(error.localizedDescription)"
   180→            self.logger.error("start failed: \(error.localizedDescription, privacy: .public)")
   181→        }
   182→    }
   183→
   184→    func stop() {
   185→        self.isEnabled = false
   186→        self.isListening = false
   187→        self.isPushToTalkActive = false
   188→        self.captureMode = .idle
   189→        self.statusText = "Off"
   190→        self.lastTranscript = ""
   191→        self.lastHeard = nil
   192→        self.silenceTask?.cancel()
   193→        self.silenceTask = nil
   194→        self.stopRecognition()
   195→        self.stopSpeaking()
   196→        self.lastInterruptedAtSeconds = nil
   197→        let pendingPTT = self.pttCompletion != nil
   198→        let pendingCaptureId = self.activePTTCaptureId ?? UUID().uuidString
   199→        self.pttTimeoutTask?.cancel()
   200→        self.pttTimeoutTask = nil
   201→        self.pttAutoStopEnabled = false
   202→        if pendingPTT {
   203→            let payload = OpenClawTalkPTTStopPayload(
   204→                captureId: pendingCaptureId,
   205→                transcript: nil,
   206→                status: "cancelled")
   207→            self.finishPTTOnce(payload)
   208→        }
   209→        self.resumeContinuousAfterPTT = false
   210→        self.activePTTCaptureId = nil
   211→        TalkSystemSpeechSynthesizer.shared.stop()
   212→        do {
   213→            try AVAudioSession.sharedInstance().setActive(false, options: [.notifyOthersOnDeactivation])
   214→        } catch {
   215→            self.logger.warning("audio session deactivate failed: \(error.localizedDescription, privacy: .public)")
   216→        }
   217→        Task { await self.unsubscribeAllChats() }
   218→    }
   219→
   220→    /// Suspends microphone usage without disabling Talk Mode.
   221→    /// Used when the app backgrounds (or when we need to temporarily release the mic).
   222→    func suspendForBackground(keepActive: Bool = false) -> Bool {
   223→        guard self.isEnabled else { return false }
   224→        if keepActive {
   225→            self.statusText = self.isListening ? "Listening" : self.statusText
   226→            return false
   227→        }
   228→        let wasActive = self.isListening || self.isSpeaking || self.isPushToTalkActive
   229→
   230→        self.isListening = false
   231→        self.isPushToTalkActive = false
   232→        self.captureMode = .idle
   233→        self.statusText = "Paused"
   234→        self.lastTranscript = ""
   235→        self.lastHeard = nil
   236→        self.silenceTask?.cancel()
   237→        self.silenceTask = nil
   238→
   239→        self.stopRecognition()
   240→        self.stopSpeaking()
   241→        self.lastInterruptedAtSeconds = nil
   242→        TalkSystemSpeechSynthesizer.shared.stop()
   243→
   244→        do {
   245→            try AVAudioSession.sharedInstance().setActive(false, options: [.notifyOthersOnDeactivation])
   246→        } catch {
   247→            self.logger.warning("audio session deactivate failed: \(error.localizedDescription, privacy: .public)")
   248→        }
   249→
   250→        Task { await self.unsubscribeAllChats() }
   251→        return wasActive
   252→    }
   253→
   254→    func resumeAfterBackground(wasSuspended: Bool, wasKeptActive: Bool = false) async {
   255→        if wasKeptActive { return }
   256→        guard wasSuspended else { return }
   257→        guard self.isEnabled else { return }
   258→        await self.start()
   259→    }

   307→                    status: SFSpeechRecognizer.authorizationStatus())
   308→                throw NSError(domain: "TalkMode", code: 5, userInfo: [
   309→                    NSLocalizedDescriptionKey: "Speech recognition permission denied",
   310→                ])
   311→            }
   312→        }
   313→
   314→        do {
   315→            try Self.configureAudioSession()
   316→            self.captureMode = .pushToTalk
   317→            try self.startRecognition()
   318→            self.isListening = true
   319→            self.isPushToTalkActive = true
   320→            self.statusText = "Listening (PTT)"
   321→        } catch {
   322→            self.isListening = false
   323→            self.isPushToTalkActive = false
   324→            self.captureMode = .idle
   325→            self.statusText = "Start failed: \(error.localizedDescription)"
   326→            throw error
   327→        }
   328→
   329→        return OpenClawTalkPTTStartPayload(captureId: captureId)
   330→    }
   331→
   332→    func endPushToTalk() async -> OpenClawTalkPTTStopPayload {
   333→        let captureId = self.activePTTCaptureId ?? UUID().uuidString
   334→        guard self.isPushToTalkActive else {
   335→            let payload = OpenClawTalkPTTStopPayload(
   336→                captureId: captureId,
   337→                transcript: nil,
   338→                status: "idle")
   339→            self.finishPTTOnce(payload)
   340→            return payload
   341→        }
   342→
   343→        self.isPushToTalkActive = false
   344→        self.isListening = false
   345→        self.captureMode = .idle
   346→        self.stopRecognition()
   347→        self.pttTimeoutTask?.cancel()
   348→        self.pttTimeoutTask = nil
   349→        self.pttAutoStopEnabled = false
   350→
   351→        let transcript = self.lastTranscript.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
   352→        self.lastTranscript = ""
   353→        self.lastHeard = nil
   354→
   355→        guard !transcript.isEmpty else {
   356→            self.statusText = "Ready"
   357→            if self.resumeContinuousAfterPTT {
   358→                await self.start()
   359→            }
   360→            self.resumeContinuousAfterPTT = false
   361→            self.activePTTCaptureId = nil
   362→            let payload = OpenClawTalkPTTStopPayload(
   363→                captureId: captureId,
   364→                transcript: nil,
   365→                status: "empty")
   366→            self.finishPTTOnce(payload)
   367→            return payload
   368→        }
   369→
   370→        guard self.gatewayConnected else {
   371→            self.statusText = "Gateway not connected"
   372→            if self.resumeContinuousAfterPTT {
   373→                await self.start()
   374→            }
   375→            self.resumeContinuousAfterPTT = false
   376→            self.activePTTCaptureId = nil
   377→            let payload = OpenClawTalkPTTStopPayload(
   378→                captureId: captureId,
   379→                transcript: transcript,
   380→                status: "offline")
   381→            self.finishPTTOnce(payload)
   382→            return payload
   383→        }
   384→
   385→        self.statusText = "Thinking…"
   386→        Task { @MainActor in
   387→            await self.processTranscript(transcript, restartAfter: self.resumeContinuousAfterPTT)
   388→        }
   389→        self.resumeContinuousAfterPTT = false
   390→        self.activePTTCaptureId = nil
   391→        let payload = OpenClawTalkPTTStopPayload(
   392→            captureId: captureId,
   393→            transcript: transcript,
   394→            status: "queued")
   395→        self.finishPTTOnce(payload)
   396→        return payload
   397→    }
   398→
   399→    func runPushToTalkOnce(maxDurationSeconds: TimeInterval = 12) async throws -> OpenClawTalkPTTStopPayload {
   400→        if self.pttCompletion != nil {
   401→            _ = await self.cancelPushToTalk()
   402→        }
   403→
   404→        if self.isPushToTalkActive {
   405→            let captureId = self.activePTTCaptureId ?? UUID().uuidString
   406→            return OpenClawTalkPTTStopPayload(
   407→                captureId: captureId,
   408→                transcript: nil,
   409→                status: "busy")
   410→        }
   411→
   412→        _ = try await self.beginPushToTalk()
   413→
   414→        return await withCheckedContinuation { cont in
   415→            self.pttCompletion = cont
   416→            self.pttAutoStopEnabled = true
   417→            self.startSilenceMonitor()
   418→            self.schedulePTTTimeout(seconds: maxDurationSeconds)
   419→        }
   420→    }
   421→
   422→    func cancelPushToTalk() async -> OpenClawTalkPTTStopPayload {
   423→        let captureId = self.activePTTCaptureId ?? UUID().uuidString
   424→        guard self.isPushToTalkActive else {
   425→            let payload = OpenClawTalkPTTStopPayload(
   426→                captureId: captureId,
   427→                transcript: nil,
   428→                status: "idle")
   429→            self.finishPTTOnce(payload)
   430→            self.pttAutoStopEnabled = false
   431→            self.pttTimeoutTask?.cancel()
   432→            self.pttTimeoutTask = nil
   433→            self.resumeContinuousAfterPTT = false
   434→            self.activePTTCaptureId = nil
   435→            return payload
   436→        }
   437→
   438→        let shouldResume = self.resumeContinuousAfterPTT
   439→        self.isPushToTalkActive = false
   440→        self.isListening = false
   441→        self.captureMode = .idle
   442→        self.stopRecognition()
   443→        self.lastTranscript = ""
   444→        self.lastHeard = nil
   445→        self.pttAutoStopEnabled = false
   446→        self.pttTimeoutTask?.cancel()
   447→        self.pttTimeoutTask = nil
   448→        self.resumeContinuousAfterPTT = false
   449→        self.activePTTCaptureId = nil
   450→        self.statusText = "Ready"
   451→
   452→        let payload = OpenClawTalkPTTStopPayload(
   453→            captureId: captureId,
   454→            transcript: nil,
   455→            status: "cancelled")
   456→        self.finishPTTOnce(payload)
   457→
   458→        if shouldResume {
   459→            await self.start()
   460→        }
   461→        return payload
   462→    }
   463→
   464→    private func startRecognition() throws {
   465→        #if targetEnvironment(simulator)
   466→            if !self.allowSimulatorCapture {
   467→                throw NSError(domain: "TalkMode", code: 2, userInfo: [
   468→                    NSLocalizedDescriptionKey: "Talk mode is not supported on the iOS simulator",
   469→                ])
   470→            } else {
   471→                self.recognitionRequest = SFSpeechAudioBufferRecognitionRequest()
   472→                self.recognitionRequest?.shouldReportPartialResults = true
   473→                return
   474→            }
   475→        #endif
   476→
   477→        self.stopRecognition()
   478→        self.speechRecognizer = SFSpeechRecognizer()
   479→        guard let recognizer = self.speechRecognizer else {
   480→            throw NSError(domain: "TalkMode", code: 1, userInfo: [
   481→                NSLocalizedDescriptionKey: "Speech recognizer unavailable",
   482→            ])
   483→        }
   484→
   485→        self.recognitionRequest = SFSpeechAudioBufferRecognitionRequest()
   486→        self.recognitionRequest?.shouldReportPartialResults = true
   487→        self.recognitionRequest?.taskHint = .dictation
   488→        guard let request = self.recognitionRequest else { return }
   489→
   490→        GatewayDiagnostics.log("talk audio: session \(Self.describeAudioSession())")
   491→
   492→        let input = self.audioEngine.inputNode
   493→        let format = input.inputFormat(forBus: 0)
   494→        guard format.sampleRate > 0, format.channelCount > 0 else {
   495→            throw NSError(domain: "TalkMode", code: 3, userInfo: [
   496→                NSLocalizedDescriptionKey: "Invalid audio input format",
   497→            ])
   498→        }
   499→        input.removeTap(onBus: 0)
   500→        let tapDiagnostics = AudioTapDiagnostics(label: "talk") { [weak self] level in
   501→            guard let self else { return }
   502→            Task { @MainActor in
   503→                // Smooth + clamp for UI, and keep it cheap.
   504→                let raw = max(0, min(Double(level) * 10.0, 1.0))
   505→                let next = (self.micLevel * 0.80) + (raw * 0.20)
   506→                self.micLevel = next
   507→
   508→                // Dynamic thresholding so background noise doesn’t prevent endpointing.
   509→                if self.isListening, !self.isSpeaking, !self.noiseFloorReady {
   510→                    self.noiseFloorSamples.append(raw)
   511→                    if self.noiseFloorSamples.count >= 22 {
   512→                        let sorted = self.noiseFloorSamples.sorted()
   513→                        let take = max(6, sorted.count / 2)
   514→                        let slice = sorted.prefix(take)
   515→                        let avg = slice.reduce(0.0, +) / Double(slice.count)
   516→                        self.noiseFloor = avg
   517→                        self.noiseFloorReady = true
   518→                        self.noiseFloorSamples.removeAll(keepingCapacity: true)
   519→                        let threshold = min(0.35, max(0.12, avg + 0.10))
   520→                        GatewayDiagnostics.log(
   521→                            "talk audio: noiseFloor=\(String(format: "%.3f", avg)) threshold=\(String(format: "%.3f", threshold))")
   522→                    }
   523→                }
   524→
   525→                let threshold: Double = if let floor = self.noiseFloor, self.noiseFloorReady {
   526→                    min(0.35, max(0.12, floor + 0.10))
   527→                } else {
   528→                    0.18
   529→                }
   530→                if raw >= threshold {
   531→                    self.lastAudioActivity = Date()
   532→                }
   533→            }
   534→        }
   535→        self.audioTapDiagnostics = tapDiagnostics
   536→        let tapBlock = Self.makeAudioTapAppendCallback(request: request, diagnostics: tapDiagnostics)
   537→        input.installTap(onBus: 0, bufferSize: 2048, format: format, block: tapBlock)
   538→        self.inputTapInstalled = true
   539→
   540→        self.audioEngine.prepare()
   541→        try self.audioEngine.start()
   542→        self.loggedPartialThisCycle = false
   543→
   544→        GatewayDiagnostics.log(
   545→            "talk speech: recognition started mode=\(String(describing: self.captureMode)) engineRunning=\(self.audioEngine.isRunning)")
   546→        self.recognitionTask = recognizer.recognitionTask(with: request) { [weak self] result, error in
   547→            guard let self else { return }
   548→            if let error {
   549→                let msg = error.localizedDescription
   550→                GatewayDiagnostics.log("talk speech: error=\(msg)")
   551→                if !self.isSpeaking {
   552→                    if msg.localizedCaseInsensitiveContains("no speech detected") {
   553→                        // Treat as transient silence. Don't scare users with an error banner.
   554→                        self.statusText = self.isEnabled ? "Listening" : "Speech error: \(msg)"
   555→                    } else {
   556→                        self.statusText = "Speech error: \(msg)"
   557→                    }
   558→                }
   559→                self.logger.debug("speech recognition error: \(msg, privacy: .public)")
   560→                // Speech recognition can terminate on transient errors (e.g. no speech detected).
   561→                // If talk mode is enabled and we're in continuous capture, try to restart.
   562→                if self.captureMode == .continuous, self.isEnabled, !self.isSpeaking {
   563→                    // Treat the task as terminal on error so we don't get stuck with a dead recognizer.
   564→                    self.stopRecognition()
   565→                    Task { @MainActor [weak self] in
   566→                        await self?.restartRecognitionAfterError()
   567→                    }
   568→                }
   569→            }
   570→            guard let result else { return }
   571→            let transcript = result.bestTranscription.formattedString
   572→            if !result.isFinal, !self.loggedPartialThisCycle {
   573→                let trimmed = transcript.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
   574→                if !trimmed.isEmpty {
   575→                    self.loggedPartialThisCycle = true
   576→                    GatewayDiagnostics.log("talk speech: partial chars=\(trimmed.count)")
   577→                }
   578→            }
   579→            Task { @MainActor in
   580→                await self.handleTranscript(transcript: transcript, isFinal: result.isFinal)
   581→            }
   582→        }
   583→    }
   584→
   585→    private func restartRecognitionAfterError() async {
   586→        guard self.isEnabled, self.captureMode == .continuous else { return }
   587→        // Avoid thrashing the audio engine if it’s already running.
   588→        if self.recognitionTask != nil, self.audioEngine.isRunning { return }
   589→        try? await Task.sleep(nanoseconds: 250_000_000)
   590→        guard self.isEnabled, self.captureMode == .continuous else { return }
   591→        do {
   592→            try Self.configureAudioSession()
   593→            try self.startRecognition()
   594→            self.isListening = true
   595→            if self.statusText.localizedCaseInsensitiveContains("speech error") {
   596→                self.statusText = "Listening"
   597→            }
   598→            GatewayDiagnostics.log("talk speech: recognition restarted")
   599→        } catch {
   600→            let msg = error.localizedDescription
   601→            GatewayDiagnostics.log("talk speech: restart failed error=\(msg)")
   602→        }
   603→    }
   604→
   605→    private func stopRecognition() {
   606→        self.recognitionTask?.cancel()
   607→        self.recognitionTask = nil
   608→        self.recognitionRequest?.endAudio()
   609→        self.recognitionRequest = nil
   610→        self.micLevel = 0
   611→        self.lastAudioActivity = nil
   612→        self.noiseFloorSamples.removeAll(keepingCapacity: true)
   613→        self.noiseFloor = nil
   614→        self.noiseFloorReady = false
   615→        self.audioTapDiagnostics = nil
   616→        if self.inputTapInstalled {
   617→            self.audioEngine.inputNode.removeTap(onBus: 0)
   618→            self.inputTapInstalled = false
   619→        }
   620→        self.audioEngine.stop()
   621→        self.speechRecognizer = nil
   622→    }
   623→
   624→    private nonisolated static func makeAudioTapAppendCallback(
   625→        request: SpeechRequest,
   626→        diagnostics: AudioTapDiagnostics) -> AVAudioNodeTapBlock
   627→    {
   628→        { buffer, _ in
   629→            request.append(buffer)
   630→            diagnostics.onBuffer(buffer)
   631→        }
   632→    }
   633→
   634→    private func handleTranscript(transcript: String, isFinal: Bool) async {
   635→        let trimmed = transcript.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
   636→        let ttsActive = self.isSpeechOutputActive
   637→        if ttsActive, self.interruptOnSpeech {
   638→            if self.shouldInterrupt(with: trimmed) {
   639→                self.stopSpeaking()
   640→            }
   641→            return
   642→        }
   643→
   644→        guard self.isListening else { return }
   645→        if !trimmed.isEmpty {
   646→            self.lastTranscript = trimmed
   647→            self.lastHeard = Date()
   648→        }
   649→        if isFinal {
   650→            self.lastTranscript = trimmed
   651→            guard !trimmed.isEmpty else { return }
   652→            GatewayDiagnostics.log("talk speech: final transcript chars=\(trimmed.count)")
   653→            self.loggedPartialThisCycle = false
   654→            if self.captureMode == .pushToTalk, self.pttAutoStopEnabled, self.isPushToTalkActive {
   655→                _ = await self.endPushToTalk()
   656→                return
   657→            }
   658→            if self.captureMode == .continuous, !self.isSpeechOutputActive {
   659→                await self.processTranscript(trimmed, restartAfter: true)
   660→            }
   661→        }
   662→    }
   663→
   664→    private func startSilenceMonitor() {
   665→        self.silenceTask?.cancel()
   666→        self.silenceTask = Task { [weak self] in
   667→            guard let self else { return }
   668→            while self.isEnabled || (self.isPushToTalkActive && self.pttAutoStopEnabled) {
   669→                try? await Task.sleep(nanoseconds: 200_000_000)
   670→                await self.checkSilence()
   671→            }
   672→        }
   673→    }
   674→
   675→    private func checkSilence() async {
   676→        if self.captureMode == .continuous {
   677→            guard self.isListening, !self.isSpeechOutputActive else { return }
   678→            let transcript = self.lastTranscript.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
   679→            guard !transcript.isEmpty else { return }
   680→            let lastActivity = [self.lastHeard, self.lastAudioActivity].compactMap { $0 }.max()
   681→            guard let lastActivity else { return }
   682→            if Date().timeIntervalSince(lastActivity) < self.silenceWindow { return }
   683→            await self.processTranscript(transcript, restartAfter: true)
   684→            return
   685→        }
   686→
   687→        guard self.captureMode == .pushToTalk, self.pttAutoStopEnabled else { return }
   688→        guard self.isListening, !self.isSpeaking, self.isPushToTalkActive else { return }
   689→        let transcript = self.lastTranscript.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
   690→        guard !transcript.isEmpty else { return }
   691→        let lastActivity = [self.lastHeard, self.lastAudioActivity].compactMap { $0 }.max()
   692→        guard let lastActivity else { return }
   693→        if Date().timeIntervalSince(lastActivity) < self.silenceWindow { return }
   694→        _ = await self.endPushToTalk()
   695→    }
   696→
   697→    // Guardrail for PTT once so we don't stay open indefinitely.
   698→    private func schedulePTTTimeout(seconds: TimeInterval) {
   699→        guard seconds > 0 else { return }
   700→        let nanos = UInt64(seconds * 1_000_000_000)
   701→        self.pttTimeoutTask?.cancel()
   702→        self.pttTimeoutTask = Task { [weak self] in
   703→            try? await Task.sleep(nanoseconds: nanos)
   704→            await self?.handlePTTTimeout()
   705→        }
   706→    }
   707→
   708→    private func handlePTTTimeout() async {
   709→        guard self.pttAutoStopEnabled, self.isPushToTalkActive else { return }
   710→        _ = await self.endPushToTalk()
   711→    }
   712→
   713→    private func finishPTTOnce(_ payload: OpenClawTalkPTTStopPayload) {
   714→        guard let continuation = self.pttCompletion else { return }
   715→        self.pttCompletion = nil
   716→        continuation.resume(returning: payload)
   717→    }
   718→
   719→    private func processTranscript(_ transcript: String, restartAfter: Bool) async {
   720→        self.isListening = false
   721→        self.captureMode = .idle
   722→        self.statusText = "Thinking…"
   723→        self.lastTranscript = ""
   724→        self.lastHeard = nil
   725→        self.stopRecognition()
   726→
   727→        GatewayDiagnostics.log("talk: process transcript chars=\(transcript.count) restartAfter=\(restartAfter)")
   728→        await self.reloadConfig()
   729→        let prompt = self.buildPrompt(transcript: transcript)
   730→        guard self.gatewayConnected, let gateway else {
   731→            self.statusText = "Gateway not connected"
   732→            self.logger.warning("finalize: gateway not connected")
   733→            GatewayDiagnostics.log("talk: abort gateway not connected")
   734→            if restartAfter {
   735→                await self.start()
   736→            }
   737→            return
   738→        }
   739→
   740→        do {
   741→            let startedAt = Date().timeIntervalSince1970
   742→            let sessionKey = self.mainSessionKey
   743→            await self.subscribeChatIfNeeded(sessionKey: sessionKey)
   744→            self.logger.info(
   745→                "chat.send start sessionKey=\(sessionKey, privacy: .public) chars=\(prompt.count, privacy: .public)")
   746→            GatewayDiagnostics.log("talk: chat.send start sessionKey=\(sessionKey) chars=\(prompt.count)")
   747→            let runId = try await self.sendChat(prompt, gateway: gateway)
   748→            self.logger.info("chat.send ok runId=\(runId, privacy: .public)")
   749→            GatewayDiagnostics.log("talk: chat.send ok runId=\(runId)")
   750→            let shouldIncremental = self.shouldUseIncrementalTTS()
   751→            var streamingTask: Task<Void, Never>?
   752→            if shouldIncremental {
   753→                self.resetIncrementalSpeech()
   754→                streamingTask = Task { @MainActor [weak self] in
   755→                    guard let self else { return }
   756→                    await self.streamAssistant(runId: runId, gateway: gateway)
   757→                }
   758→            }
   759→            let completion = await self.waitForChatCompletion(runId: runId, gateway: gateway, timeoutSeconds: 120)
   760→            if completion == .timeout {
   761→                self.logger.warning(
   762→                    "chat completion timeout runId=\(runId, privacy: .public); attempting history fallback")
   763→                GatewayDiagnostics.log("talk: chat completion timeout runId=\(runId)")
   764→            } else if completion == .aborted {
   765→                self.statusText = "Aborted"
   766→                self.logger.warning("chat completion aborted runId=\(runId, privacy: .public)")
   767→                GatewayDiagnostics.log("talk: chat completion aborted runId=\(runId)")
   768→                streamingTask?.cancel()
   769→                await self.finishIncrementalSpeech()
   770→                await self.start()
   771→                return
   772→            } else if completion == .error {
   773→                self.statusText = "Chat error"
   774→                self.logger.warning("chat completion error runId=\(runId, privacy: .public)")
   775→                GatewayDiagnostics.log("talk: chat completion error runId=\(runId)")
   776→                streamingTask?.cancel()
   777→                await self.finishIncrementalSpeech()
   778→                await self.start()
   779→                return
   780→            }
   781→
   782→            var assistantText = try await self.waitForAssistantText(
   783→                gateway: gateway,
   784→                since: startedAt,
   785→                timeoutSeconds: completion == .final ? 12 : 25)
   786→            if assistantText == nil, shouldIncremental {
   787→                let fallback = self.incrementalSpeechBuffer.latestText
   788→                if !fallback.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines).isEmpty {
   789→                    assistantText = fallback
   790→                }
   791→            }
   792→            guard let assistantText else {
   793→                self.statusText = "No reply"
   794→                self.logger.warning("assistant text timeout runId=\(runId, privacy: .public)")
   795→                GatewayDiagnostics.log("talk: assistant text timeout runId=\(runId)")
   796→                streamingTask?.cancel()
   797→                await self.finishIncrementalSpeech()
   798→                await self.start()
   799→                return
   800→            }
   801→            self.logger.info("assistant text ok chars=\(assistantText.count, privacy: .public)")
   802→            GatewayDiagnostics.log("talk: assistant text ok chars=\(assistantText.count)")
   803→            streamingTask?.cancel()
   804→            if shouldIncremental {
   805→                await self.handleIncrementalAssistantFinal(text: assistantText)
   806→            } else {
   807→                await self.playAssistant(text: assistantText)
   808→            }
   809→        } catch {
   810→            self.statusText = "Talk failed: \(error.localizedDescription)"
   811→            self.logger.error("finalize failed: \(error.localizedDescription, privacy: .public)")
   812→            GatewayDiagnostics.log("talk: failed error=\(error.localizedDescription)")
   813→        }
   814→
   815→        if restartAfter {
   816→            await self.start()
   817→        }
   818→    }
   819→
   820→    private func subscribeChatIfNeeded(sessionKey: String) async {
   821→        let key = sessionKey.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
   822→        guard !key.isEmpty else { return }
   823→        guard !self.chatSubscribedSessionKeys.contains(key) else { return }
   824→
   825→        // Operator clients receive chat events without node-style subscriptions.
   826→        self.chatSubscribedSessionKeys.insert(key)
   827→    }
   828→
   829→    private func unsubscribeAllChats() async {
   830→        self.chatSubscribedSessionKeys.removeAll()
   831→    }
   832→
   833→    private func buildPrompt(transcript: String) -> String {
   834→        let interrupted = self.lastInterruptedAtSeconds
   835→        self.lastInterruptedAtSeconds = nil
   836→        let includeVoiceDirectiveHint = (UserDefaults.standard.object(forKey: "talk.voiceDirectiveHint.enabled") as? Bool) ?? true
   837→        return TalkPromptBuilder.build(
   838→            transcript: transcript,
   839→            interruptedAtSeconds: interrupted,
   840→            includeVoiceDirectiveHint: includeVoiceDirectiveHint)
   841→    }
   842→
   843→    private enum ChatCompletionState: CustomStringConvertible {
   844→        case final
   845→        case aborted
   846→        case error
   847→        case timeout
   848→
   849→        var description: String {
   850→            switch self {
   851→            case .final: "final"
   852→            case .aborted: "aborted"
   853→            case .error: "error"
   854→            case .timeout: "timeout"
   855→            }
   856→        }
   857→    }
   858→
   859→    private func sendChat(_ message: String, gateway: GatewayNodeSession) async throws -> String {
   860→        struct SendResponse: Decodable { let runId: String }
   861→        let payload: [String: Any] = [
   862→            "sessionKey": self.mainSessionKey,
   863→            "message": message,
   864→            "thinking": "low",
   865→            "timeoutMs": 30000,
   866→            "idempotencyKey": UUID().uuidString,
   867→        ]
   868→        let data = try JSONSerialization.data(withJSONObject: payload)
   869→        guard let json = String(bytes: data, encoding: .utf8) else {
   870→            throw NSError(
   871→                domain: "TalkModeManager",
   872→                code: 1,
   873→                userInfo: [NSLocalizedDescriptionKey: "Failed to encode chat payload"])
   874→        }
   875→        let res = try await gateway.request(method: "chat.send", paramsJSON: json, timeoutSeconds: 30)
   876→        let decoded = try JSONDecoder().decode(SendResponse.self, from: res)
   877→        return decoded.runId
   878→    }
   879→
   880→    private func waitForChatCompletion(
   881→        runId: String,
   882→        gateway: GatewayNodeSession,
   883→        timeoutSeconds: Int = 120) async -> ChatCompletionState
   884→    {
   885→        let stream = await gateway.subscribeServerEvents(bufferingNewest: 200)
   886→        return await withTaskGroup(of: ChatCompletionState.self) { group in
   887→            group.addTask { [runId] in
   888→                for await evt in stream {
   889→                    if Task.isCancelled { return .timeout }
   890→                    guard evt.event == "chat", let payload = evt.payload else { continue }
   891→                    guard let chatEvent = try? GatewayPayloadDecoding.decode(payload, as: ChatEvent.self) else {
   892→                        continue
   893→                    }
   894→                    guard chatEvent.runid == runId else { continue }
   895→                    if let state = chatEvent.state.value as? String {
   896→                        switch state {
   897→                        case "final": return .final
   898→                        case "aborted": return .aborted
   899→                        case "error": return .error
   900→                        default: break
   901→                        }
   902→                    }
   903→                }
   904→                return .timeout
   905→            }
   906→            group.addTask {
   907→                try? await Task.sleep(nanoseconds: UInt64(timeoutSeconds) * 1_000_000_000)
   908→                return .timeout
   909→            }
   910→            let result = await group.next() ?? .timeout
   911→            group.cancelAll()
   912→            return result
   913→        }
   914→    }
   915→
   916→    private func waitForAssistantText(
   917→        gateway: GatewayNodeSession,
   918→        since: Double,
   919→        timeoutSeconds: Int) async throws -> String?
   920→    {
   921→        let deadline = Date().addingTimeInterval(TimeInterval(timeoutSeconds))
   922→        while Date() < deadline {
   923→            if let text = try await self.fetchLatestAssistantText(gateway: gateway, since: since) {
   924→                return text
   925→            }
   926→            try? await Task.sleep(nanoseconds: 300_000_000)
   927→        }
   928→        return nil
   929→    }
   930→
   931→    private func fetchLatestAssistantText(gateway: GatewayNodeSession, since: Double? = nil) async throws -> String? {
   932→        let res = try await gateway.request(
   933→            method: "chat.history",
   934→            paramsJSON: "{\"sessionKey\":\"\(self.mainSessionKey)\"}",
   935→            timeoutSeconds: 15)
   936→        guard let json = try JSONSerialization.jsonObject(with: res) as? [String: Any] else { return nil }
   937→        guard let messages = json["messages"] as? [[String: Any]] else { return nil }
   938→        for msg in messages.reversed() {
   939→            guard (msg["role"] as? String) == "assistant" else { continue }
   940→            if let since, let timestamp = msg["timestamp"] as? Double,
   941→               TalkHistoryTimestamp.isAfter(timestamp, sinceSeconds: since) == false
   942→            {
   943→                continue
   944→            }
   945→            guard let content = msg["content"] as? [[String: Any]] else { continue }
   946→            let text = content.compactMap { $0["text"] as? String }.joined(separator: "\n")
   947→            let trimmed = text.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
   948→            if !trimmed.isEmpty { return trimmed }
   949→        }
   950→        return nil
   951→    }

   953→    private func playAssistant(text: String) async {
   954→        let parsed = TalkDirectiveParser.parse(text)
   955→        let directive = parsed.directive
   956→        let cleaned = parsed.stripped.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
   957→        guard !cleaned.isEmpty else { return }
   958→        self.applyDirective(directive)
   959→
   960→        self.statusText = "Generating voice…"
   961→        self.isSpeaking = true
   962→        self.lastSpokenText = cleaned
   963→
   964→        do {
   965→            let started = Date()
   966→            let language = ElevenLabsTTSClient.validatedLanguage(directive?.language)
   967→            let requestedVoice = directive?.voiceId?.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
   968→            let resolvedVoice = self.resolveVoiceAlias(requestedVoice)
   969→            if requestedVoice?.isEmpty == false, resolvedVoice == nil {
   970→                self.logger.warning("unknown voice alias \(requestedVoice ?? "?", privacy: .public)")
   971→            }
   972→
   973→            let resolvedKey =
   974→                (self.apiKey?.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines).isEmpty == false ? self.apiKey : nil) ??
   975→                ProcessInfo.processInfo.environment["ELEVENLABS_API_KEY"]
   976→            let apiKey = resolvedKey?.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
   977→            let preferredVoice = resolvedVoice ?? self.currentVoiceId ?? self.defaultVoiceId
   978→            let voiceId: String? = if let apiKey, !apiKey.isEmpty {
   979→                await self.resolveVoiceId(preferred: preferredVoice, apiKey: apiKey)
   980→            } else {
   981→                nil
   982→            }
   983→            let canUseElevenLabs = (voiceId?.isEmpty == false) && (apiKey?.isEmpty == false)
   984→
   985→            if canUseElevenLabs, let voiceId, let apiKey {
   986→                GatewayDiagnostics.log("talk tts: provider=elevenlabs voiceId=\(voiceId)")
   987→                let desiredOutputFormat = (directive?.outputFormat ?? self.defaultOutputFormat)?
   988→                    .trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
   989→                let requestedOutputFormat = (desiredOutputFormat?.isEmpty == false) ? desiredOutputFormat : nil
   990→                let outputFormat = ElevenLabsTTSClient.validatedOutputFormat(requestedOutputFormat ?? "pcm_44100")
   991→                if outputFormat == nil, let requestedOutputFormat {
   992→                    self.logger.warning(
   993→                        "talk output_format unsupported for local playback: \(requestedOutputFormat, privacy: .public)")
   994→                }
   995→
   996→                let modelId = directive?.modelId ?? self.currentModelId ?? self.defaultModelId
   997→                if let modelId {
   998→                    GatewayDiagnostics.log("talk tts: modelId=\(modelId)")
   999→                }
  1000→                func makeRequest(outputFormat: String?) -> ElevenLabsTTSRequest {
  1001→                    ElevenLabsTTSRequest(
  1002→                        text: cleaned,
  1003→                        modelId: modelId,
  1004→                        outputFormat: outputFormat,
  1005→                        speed: TalkTTSValidation.resolveSpeed(speed: directive?.speed, rateWPM: directive?.rateWPM),
  1006→                        stability: TalkTTSValidation.validatedStability(directive?.stability, modelId: modelId),
  1007→                        similarity: TalkTTSValidation.validatedUnit(directive?.similarity),
  1008→                        style: TalkTTSValidation.validatedUnit(directive?.style),
  1009→                        speakerBoost: directive?.speakerBoost,
  1010→                        seed: TalkTTSValidation.validatedSeed(directive?.seed),
  1011→                        normalize: ElevenLabsTTSClient.validatedNormalize(directive?.normalize),
  1012→                        language: language,
  1013→                        latencyTier: TalkTTSValidation.validatedLatencyTier(directive?.latencyTier))
  1014→                }
  1015→
  1016→                let request = makeRequest(outputFormat: outputFormat)
  1017→
  1018→                let client = ElevenLabsTTSClient(apiKey: apiKey)
  1019→                let stream = client.streamSynthesize(voiceId: voiceId, request: request)
  1020→
  1021→                if self.interruptOnSpeech {
  1022→                    do {
  1023→                        try self.startRecognition()
  1024→                    } catch {
  1025→                        self.logger.warning(
  1026→                            "startRecognition during speak failed: \(error.localizedDescription, privacy: .public)")
  1027→                    }
  1028→                }
  1029→
  1030→                self.statusText = "Speaking…"
  1031→                let sampleRate = TalkTTSValidation.pcmSampleRate(from: outputFormat)
  1032→                let result: StreamingPlaybackResult
  1033→                if let sampleRate {
  1034→                    self.lastPlaybackWasPCM = true
  1035→                    var playback = await self.pcmPlayer.play(stream: stream, sampleRate: sampleRate)
  1036→                    if !playback.finished, playback.interruptedAt == nil {
  1037→                        let mp3Format = ElevenLabsTTSClient.validatedOutputFormat("mp3_44100")
  1038→                        self.logger.warning("pcm playback failed; retrying mp3")
  1039→                        self.lastPlaybackWasPCM = false
  1040→                        let mp3Stream = client.streamSynthesize(
  1041→                            voiceId: voiceId,
  1042→                            request: makeRequest(outputFormat: mp3Format))
  1043→                        playback = await self.mp3Player.play(stream: mp3Stream)
  1044→                    }
  1045→                    result = playback
  1046→                } else {
  1047→                    self.lastPlaybackWasPCM = false
  1048→                    result = await self.mp3Player.play(stream: stream)
  1049→                }
  1050→                let duration = Date().timeIntervalSince(started)
  1051→                self.logger.info("elevenlabs stream finished=\(result.finished, privacy: .public) dur=\(duration, privacy: .public)s")
  1052→                if !result.finished, let interruptedAt = result.interruptedAt {
  1053→                    self.lastInterruptedAtSeconds = interruptedAt
  1054→                }
  1055→            } else {
  1056→                self.logger.warning("tts unavailable; falling back to system voice (missing key or voiceId)")
  1057→                GatewayDiagnostics.log("talk tts: provider=system (missing key or voiceId)")
  1058→                if self.interruptOnSpeech {
  1059→                    do {
  1060→                        try self.startRecognition()
  1061→                    } catch {
  1062→                        self.logger.warning(
  1063→                            "startRecognition during speak failed: \(error.localizedDescription, privacy: .public)")
  1064→                    }
  1065→                }
  1066→                self.statusText = "Speaking (System)…"
  1067→                try await TalkSystemSpeechSynthesizer.shared.speak(text: cleaned, language: language)
  1068→            }
  1069→        } catch {
  1070→            self.logger.error(
  1071→                "tts failed: \(error.localizedDescription, privacy: .public); falling back to system voice")
  1072→            GatewayDiagnostics.log("talk tts: provider=system (error) msg=\(error.localizedDescription)")
  1073→            do {
  1074→                if self.interruptOnSpeech {
  1075→                    do {
  1076→                        try self.startRecognition()
  1077→                    } catch {
  1078→                        self.logger.warning(
  1079→                            "startRecognition during speak failed: \(error.localizedDescription, privacy: .public)")
  1080→                    }
  1081→                }
  1082→                self.statusText = "Speaking (System)…"
  1083→                let language = ElevenLabsTTSClient.validatedLanguage(directive?.language)
  1084→                try await TalkSystemSpeechSynthesizer.shared.speak(text: cleaned, language: language)
  1085→            } catch {
  1086→                self.statusText = "Speak failed: \(error.localizedDescription)"
  1087→                self.logger.error("system voice failed: \(error.localizedDescription, privacy: .public)")
  1088→            }
  1089→        }
  1090→
  1091→        self.stopRecognition()
  1092→        self.isSpeaking = false
  1093→    }

  1095→    private func stopSpeaking(storeInterruption: Bool = true) {
  1096→        let hasIncremental = self.incrementalSpeechActive ||
  1097→            self.incrementalSpeechTask != nil ||
  1098→            !self.incrementalSpeechQueue.isEmpty
  1099→        if self.isSpeaking {
  1100→            let interruptedAt = self.lastPlaybackWasPCM
  1101→                ? self.pcmPlayer.stop()
  1102→                : self.mp3Player.stop()
  1103→            if storeInterruption {
  1104→                self.lastInterruptedAtSeconds = interruptedAt
  1105→            }
  1106→            _ = self.lastPlaybackWasPCM
  1107→                ? self.mp3Player.stop()
  1108→                : self.pcmPlayer.stop()
  1109→        } else if !hasIncremental {
  1110→            return
  1111→        }
  1112→        TalkSystemSpeechSynthesizer.shared.stop()
  1113→        self.cancelIncrementalSpeech()
  1114→        self.isSpeaking = false
  1115→    }
  1116→
  1117→    private func shouldInterrupt(with transcript: String) -> Bool {
  1118→        guard self.shouldAllowSpeechInterruptForCurrentRoute() else { return false }
  1119→        let trimmed = transcript.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
  1120→        guard trimmed.count >= 3 else { return false }
  1121→        if let spoken = self.lastSpokenText?.lowercased(), spoken.contains(trimmed.lowercased()) {
  1122→            return false
  1123→        }
  1124→        return true
  1125→    }
  1126→
  1127→    private func shouldAllowSpeechInterruptForCurrentRoute() -> Bool {
  1128→        let route = AVAudioSession.sharedInstance().currentRoute
  1129→        // Built-in speaker/receiver often feeds TTS back into STT, causing false interrupts.
  1130→        // Allow barge-in for isolated outputs (headphones/Bluetooth/USB/CarPlay/AirPlay).
  1131→        return !route.outputs.contains { output in
  1132→            switch output.portType {
  1133→            case .builtInSpeaker, .builtInReceiver:
  1134→                return true
  1135→            default:
  1136→                return false
  1137→            }
  1138→        }
  1139→    }
  1140→
  1141→    private func shouldUseIncrementalTTS() -> Bool {
  1142→        true
  1143→    }
  1144→
  1145→    private var isSpeechOutputActive: Bool {
  1146→        self.isSpeaking ||
  1147→            self.incrementalSpeechActive ||
  1148→            self.incrementalSpeechTask != nil ||
  1149→            !self.incrementalSpeechQueue.isEmpty
  1150→    }
  1151→
  1152→    private func applyDirective(_ directive: TalkDirective?) {
  1153→        let requestedVoice = directive?.voiceId?.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
  1154→        let resolvedVoice = self.resolveVoiceAlias(requestedVoice)
  1155→        if requestedVoice?.isEmpty == false, resolvedVoice == nil {
  1156→            self.logger.warning("unknown voice alias \(requestedVoice ?? "?", privacy: .public)")
  1157→        }
  1158→        if let voice = resolvedVoice {
  1159→            if directive?.once != true {
  1160→                self.currentVoiceId = voice
  1161→                self.voiceOverrideActive = true
  1162→            }
  1163→        }
  1164→        if let model = directive?.modelId {
  1165→            if directive?.once != true {
  1166→                self.currentModelId = model
  1167→                self.modelOverrideActive = true
  1168→            }
  1169→        }
  1170→    }
  1171→
  1172→    private func resetIncrementalSpeech() {
  1173→        self.incrementalSpeechQueue.removeAll()
  1174→        self.incrementalSpeechTask?.cancel()
  1175→        self.incrementalSpeechTask = nil
  1176→        self.incrementalSpeechActive = true
  1177→        self.incrementalSpeechUsed = false
  1178→        self.incrementalSpeechLanguage = nil
  1179→        self.incrementalSpeechBuffer = IncrementalSpeechBuffer()
  1180→        self.incrementalSpeechContext = nil
  1181→        self.incrementalSpeechDirective = nil
  1182→    }
  1183→
  1184→    private func cancelIncrementalSpeech() {
  1185→        self.incrementalSpeechQueue.removeAll()
  1186→        self.incrementalSpeechTask?.cancel()
  1187→        self.incrementalSpeechTask = nil
  1188→        self.incrementalSpeechActive = false
  1189→        self.incrementalSpeechContext = nil
  1190→        self.incrementalSpeechDirective = nil
  1191→    }
  1192→
  1193→    private func enqueueIncrementalSpeech(_ text: String) {
  1194→        let trimmed = text.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
  1195→        guard !trimmed.isEmpty else { return }
  1196→        self.incrementalSpeechQueue.append(trimmed)
  1197→        self.incrementalSpeechUsed = true
  1198→        if self.incrementalSpeechTask == nil {
  1199→            self.startIncrementalSpeechTask()
  1200→        }
  1201→    }
  1202→
  1203→    private func startIncrementalSpeechTask() {
  1204→        if self.interruptOnSpeech {
  1205→            do {
  1206→                try self.startRecognition()
  1207→            } catch {
  1208→                self.logger.warning(
  1209→                    "startRecognition during incremental speak failed: \(error.localizedDescription, privacy: .public)")
  1210→            }
  1211→        }
  1212→
  1213→        self.incrementalSpeechTask = Task { @MainActor [weak self] in
  1214→            guard let self else { return }
  1215→            while !Task.isCancelled {
  1216→                guard !self.incrementalSpeechQueue.isEmpty else { break }
  1217→                let segment = self.incrementalSpeechQueue.removeFirst()
  1218→                self.statusText = "Speaking…"
  1219→                self.isSpeaking = true
  1220→                self.lastSpokenText = segment
  1221→                await self.speakIncrementalSegment(segment)
  1222→            }
  1223→            self.isSpeaking = false
  1224→            self.stopRecognition()
  1225→            self.incrementalSpeechTask = nil
  1226→        }
  1227→    }
  1228→
  1229→    private func finishIncrementalSpeech() async {
  1230→        guard self.incrementalSpeechActive else { return }
  1231→        let leftover = self.incrementalSpeechBuffer.flush()
  1232→        if let leftover {
  1233→            self.enqueueIncrementalSpeech(leftover)
  1234→        }
  1235→        if let task = self.incrementalSpeechTask {
  1236→            _ = await task.result
  1237→        }
  1238→        self.incrementalSpeechActive = false
  1239→    }
  1240→
  1241→    private func handleIncrementalAssistantFinal(text: String) async {
  1242→        let parsed = TalkDirectiveParser.parse(text)
  1243→        self.applyDirective(parsed.directive)
  1244→        if let lang = parsed.directive?.language {
  1245→            self.incrementalSpeechLanguage = ElevenLabsTTSClient.validatedLanguage(lang)
  1246→        }
  1247→        await self.updateIncrementalContextIfNeeded()
  1248→        let segments = self.incrementalSpeechBuffer.ingest(text: text, isFinal: true)
  1249→        for segment in segments {
  1250→            self.enqueueIncrementalSpeech(segment)
  1251→        }
  1252→        await self.finishIncrementalSpeech()
  1253→        if !self.incrementalSpeechUsed {
  1254→            await self.playAssistant(text: text)
  1255→        }
  1256→    }
  1257→
  1258→    private func streamAssistant(runId: String, gateway: GatewayNodeSession) async {
  1259→        let stream = await gateway.subscribeServerEvents(bufferingNewest: 200)
  1260→        for await evt in stream {
  1261→            if Task.isCancelled { return }
  1262→            guard evt.event == "agent", let payload = evt.payload else { continue }
  1263→            guard let agentEvent = try? GatewayPayloadDecoding.decode(payload, as: OpenClawAgentEventPayload.self) else {
  1264→                continue
  1265→            }
  1266→            guard agentEvent.runId == runId, agentEvent.stream == "assistant" else { continue }
  1267→            guard let text = agentEvent.data["text"]?.value as? String else { continue }
  1268→            let segments = self.incrementalSpeechBuffer.ingest(text: text, isFinal: false)
  1269→            if let lang = self.incrementalSpeechBuffer.directive?.language {
  1270→                self.incrementalSpeechLanguage = ElevenLabsTTSClient.validatedLanguage(lang)
  1271→            }
  1272→            await self.updateIncrementalContextIfNeeded()
  1273→            for segment in segments {
  1274→                self.enqueueIncrementalSpeech(segment)
  1275→            }
  1276→        }
  1277→    }
  1278→
  1279→    private func updateIncrementalContextIfNeeded() async {
  1280→        let directive = self.incrementalSpeechBuffer.directive
  1281→        if let existing = self.incrementalSpeechContext, directive == self.incrementalSpeechDirective {
  1282→            if existing.language != self.incrementalSpeechLanguage {
  1283→                self.incrementalSpeechContext = IncrementalSpeechContext(
  1284→                    apiKey: existing.apiKey,
  1285→                    voiceId: existing.voiceId,
  1286→                    modelId: existing.modelId,
  1287→                    outputFormat: existing.outputFormat,
  1288→                    language: self.incrementalSpeechLanguage,
  1289→                    directive: existing.directive,
  1290→                    canUseElevenLabs: existing.canUseElevenLabs)
  1291→            }
  1292→            return
  1293→        }
  1294→        let context = await self.buildIncrementalSpeechContext(directive: directive)
  1295→        self.incrementalSpeechContext = context
  1296→        self.incrementalSpeechDirective = directive
  1297→    }
  1298→
  1299→    private func buildIncrementalSpeechContext(directive: TalkDirective?) async -> IncrementalSpeechContext {
  1300→        let requestedVoice = directive?.voiceId?.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
  1301→        let resolvedVoice = self.resolveVoiceAlias(requestedVoice)
  1302→        if requestedVoice?.isEmpty == false, resolvedVoice == nil {
  1303→            self.logger.warning("unknown voice alias \(requestedVoice ?? "?", privacy: .public)")
  1304→        }
  1305→        let preferredVoice = resolvedVoice ?? self.currentVoiceId ?? self.defaultVoiceId
  1306→        let modelId = directive?.modelId ?? self.currentModelId ?? self.defaultModelId
  1307→        let desiredOutputFormat = (directive?.outputFormat ?? self.defaultOutputFormat)?
  1308→            .trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
  1309→        let requestedOutputFormat = (desiredOutputFormat?.isEmpty == false) ? desiredOutputFormat : nil
  1310→        let outputFormat = ElevenLabsTTSClient.validatedOutputFormat(requestedOutputFormat ?? "pcm_44100")
  1311→        if outputFormat == nil, let requestedOutputFormat {
  1312→            self.logger.warning(
  1313→                "talk output_format unsupported for local playback: \(requestedOutputFormat, privacy: .public)")
  1314→        }
  1315→
  1316→        let resolvedKey =
  1317→            (self.apiKey?.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines).isEmpty == false ? self.apiKey : nil) ??
  1318→            ProcessInfo.processInfo.environment["ELEVENLABS_API_KEY"]
  1319→        let apiKey = resolvedKey?.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
  1320→        let voiceId: String? = if let apiKey, !apiKey.isEmpty {
  1321→            await self.resolveVoiceId(preferred: preferredVoice, apiKey: apiKey)
  1322→        } else {
  1323→            nil
  1324→        }
  1325→        let canUseElevenLabs = (voiceId?.isEmpty == false) && (apiKey?.isEmpty == false)
  1326→        return IncrementalSpeechContext(
  1327→            apiKey: apiKey,
  1328→            voiceId: voiceId,
  1329→            modelId: modelId,
  1330→            outputFormat: outputFormat,
  1331→            language: self.incrementalSpeechLanguage,
  1332→            directive: directive,
  1333→            canUseElevenLabs: canUseElevenLabs)
  1334→    }
